# Scenario Simulation Results

**Key:** carryScore = (weak partner change) - (strong partner change). Positive means the weak partner got more than the strong partner. Negative means the strong partner got more.

## balanced vs balanced, close win

- Team: 1500/1500 (avg 1500) — balanced, weak=same, strong=same
- Opponents: 1500/1500 (avg 1500) — balanced
- Score: 11-9 (team wins)

| CURRENT underdog-credit | +13 | +14 | -1 |
